items.headline: Treasury yields gain after sticky February inflation reading, oil price increase
items.summary: U.S. Treasury yields moved higher on Wednesday as assessed February's inflation report and monitored developments on the US-Iran war front.

items.headline: Nebius stock pops 16% on Nvidia $2 billion investment announcement
items.summary: The announcement comes a week after Nvidia unveiled partnerships with Lumentum and Coherent, investing $2 billion in each company.

items.headline: Trump will decide whether U.S. participates in IEA release of oil reserves, Interior Secretary says
items.summary: The IEA is group of 32 advanced economies primarily in Europe, North America and northeast Asia. The U.S. is a member of the organization.

items.headline: Why the IEA’s largest-ever release of oil reserves is pushing up crude prices
items.summary: The largest-ever release of oil from the International Energy Agency’s emergency stockpiles lifted prices for the commodity up by nearly 5% on Wednesday.

items.headline: Food prices could rise as Iran conflict disrupts fertilizer supply chain
items.summary: The Iran conflict is disrupting fertilizer shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, raising supply concerns and potentially increasing global food inflation.

items.headline: There’s no policy response that can stop the rise in oil prices: Carlyle’s Currie
items.summary: The oil market on Wednesday saw the strongest effort by far to ensure adequate global supplies of the commodity, but commodities guru Jeff Currie said the International Energy Agency’s decision to release an unprecedented amount of crude from its reserve won’t halt oil’s climb.

items.headline: You can't 'borrow your way out of debt,' expert says — but more consumers are trying
items.summary: Borrowers who struggle with high-interest debt often turn to personal loans to help pay it off, but without a change in habits debt can become a cycle.

items.headline: Defense stocks are the market’s newest safe havens — and this ETF is a pure play

items.headline: Oracle's TikTok stake sits at just over $2 billion, filing shows

items.headline: Iran war: Trump says he's not worried about domestic terror attack
items.summary: President Donald Trump said oil companies should send tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, which has remained effectively closed due to the war on Iran.

items.headline: United Airlines just set a daily record for bookings, but that isn’t helping the stock
items.summary: Rising crude prices have been a major drag on U.S. airlines stocks, but in the middle of Spring Break season and as people look ahead to summer air travel, United Airlines says it is breaking booking records.
